name: Samawa Idle
short_description: Unleash the power of specialized towers to annihilate hordes of monsters in this idle game with roguelike elements. Collect gold, level up your towers, face powerful bosses, and refine your strategy with an evolving skill tree.
detailed_description:
Jump into a world where monsters are everywhere, and it's up to you to stop them!
-A flexible game that you can play as your main activity or enjoy casually while working or playing other games.

Create your own builds:
There are various upgrading systems in this game, including: unlocking random gears, obtaining powerful passives, and utilizing the skill tree.


Key features:

Unique Towers: Choose from a different set of towers, each with its special way of attacking and upgrading.

Roguelike Elements: With random rewards and various passives and upgrades, no two resets will feel the same.

Skill Tree: Spend skill points on new upgrades to boost your gameplay. With six paths filled with skills, you can customize your game experience.

Offline Progress: When you exit the game, your towers will keep farming for you. When you come back you will find all the precious rewards they found


Two Layers of Prestige: Unlock three new contents, The Champion, Shards of Valor and Books of Powers to significantly improve your power.

The Automator: A feature that plays the game for you, unlocks towers and purchases upgrades by itself.

And many more

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese
